title: Popup UI: connect/disconnect/status display
description: Verify popup UI displays correct state and handles user interactions

steps.expected: Shows host input (default: cowork.bmobot.ai), token input, PSK config section, Connect button enabled, Disconnect disabled

steps.action: Enter host and token, click Connect
steps.expected: Status changes to 'Connecting...', Connect button disabled
Status shows 'Connected (Encrypted)', Disconnect button enabled, badge turns green
Popup recovers state from chrome.storage.session — shows connected status
Status shows 'Disconnected', Connect button re-enabled, badge turns gray
Error message 'Authentication failed' displayed in popup, badge turns red briefly
